## Problem
LeetCode number / source, and which topic folder it belongs in.

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows `templates/problem_template.md` exactly (no skipped sections)
- [ ] Brute force AND optimized solutions included, both with complexity stated
- [ ] Dry run included on a concrete example
- [ ] Edge cases listed
- [ ] Mistakes section filled honestly (not left as boilerplate)
- [ ] Topic's problem table in its `README.md` updated
